evals.prompt: Create the /api/messages/generate endpoint that uses OpenRouter to generate a draft message for a contact
evals.expected_output: New API route that calls OpenRouter, creates a draft Message
expectations: A route file exists at src/app/api/messages/generate/route.ts
It accepts a contactId in the request body
It fetches the contact data from Prisma for prompt context
It calls OpenRouter's chat completions endpoint
It creates a Message record with status 'draft'
It uses the ghostwriting prompt template from the reference implementation

evals.prompt: Add a Generate Message button to the queue card that creates an AI draft
evals.expected_output: Button added to queue-card.tsx that calls the generate endpoint
expectations: A new button is added alongside the existing actions
Loading state is shown while generating
